groups.matchedSelector:
body :where(
  p,
  span,
  div,
  mark,
  a,
  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6,
  li,
  label,
  button,
  input,
  textarea,
  select,
  option,
  em,
  strong,
  b,
  i,
  small,
  time,
  cite,
  q,
  blockquote,
  figcaption,
  summary,
  dt, dd,
  th, td, caption,
  legend,
  [role="heading"],
  [role="button"],
  [role="menuitem"],
  [role="option"],
  [role="tab"]
):not(
  [class*="icon" i],
  [class*="symbol" i],
  [class*="glyph" i],
  [class*="material-icons" i],
  [class*="fa-"],
  [class~="fa"],
  [class*="bi-"],
  [role="img"],
  pre *,
  code, code *,
  kbd, samp
)
groups.fontFamily: "Atlassian Sans", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Ubuntu, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif

sourceDeclarations.value: 14px / 20px "Atlassian Sans", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Ubuntu, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
"Atlassian Sans", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, "system-ui", "Segoe UI", Ubuntu, "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
